paymentId.description: The same `paymentId` sent in the request.

code.description: Provider's operation/error code to be logged.

message.description: Provider's operation/error message to be logged.

requestId.description: The same `requestId` sent in the request.

connectorMetadata.description: Array containing metadata fields sent from the provider to the payment gateway.

name.description: The name of the metadata to be stored in the gateway (limited to 20 characters).

value.description: The value of the metadata stored (limited to 200 characters).
